sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, IF( date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, CONCAT(substr(#startDate#,1,11), substr(START_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS START_DATE, IF( date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, CONCAT(substr(#endDate#,1,11), substr(END_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS END_DATE, MODAPPL, REGION, MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, B.TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) WHERE WRITER_ID = #pidList# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( (START_DATE >= #startDate# and START_DATE <= #endDate#) or (END_DATE >= #startDate# and END_DATE < #endDate#) or (START_DATE < #startDate# and END_DATE >= #endDate#) ) ORDER BY A.TYPE_ID
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, REGION, MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, TYPE_ID) VALUES( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #deptId#, IFNULL(#startDate#, ''), #endDate#, IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_conf WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT a.attitude_id as ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.change_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, a.appr_user_name as APPR_USER_NAME, b.start_date as START_DATE, a.appr_status as APPR_STATUS FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.WRITER_ID = #userId#

SELECT SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, #endDate#, date_add(IFNULL(END_DATE, START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, #startDate#, date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + COUNT(TYPE_ID) AS SUM_DATE, TYPE_ID FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude WHERE WRITER_ID = #pidList# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A02', 'A03') AND ( (START_DATE >= #startDate# and START_DATE <= #endDate#) or (END_DATE >= #startDate# and END_DATE < #endDate#) or (START_DATE < #startDate# and END_DATE >= #endDate#) ) GROUP BY TYPE_ID
SELECT count(*) FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.WRITER_ID = #userId#
